name: Ming's Shrimp Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the shrimp, ginger, garlic, and water chestnuts in a meat grinder or food processor. Season with salt and pepper. The mixture should be paste-like.
2. Add sherry, egg white, and baking soda to the shrimp mixture.
3. Spread it generously over bread slices. Trim edges.
4. Cut each piece of bread diagonally into quarters, forming individual triangles. Form a mound in the center of each triangle with the spread and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
5. Heat oil to 300 to 325°F (150 to 160°C). Deep-fry shrimp toasts until golden brown on both sides.
6. Drain on paper towels and serve with mustard sauce and sweet & sour sauce.
